side_effects.description: Day after dose increase to 1mg: heart rate spike from 90 to 190 bpm, suspected benign SVT episode
Severe anxiety triggered by cardiac episode awareness, ongoing nervous system dysregulation

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg twice weekly for 6 weeks, then increased to 1mg. All medical tests (blood work, EKG) came back normal. Notes Retatrutide affects glucagon receptors present in heart. References Phase 3 FDA trials including cardiac monitoring with Holter monitors. Currently managing post-episode anxiety and nervous system recovery.
